prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次约 47741→48156→54261→56421→69412，整体呈持续后移趋势，近 3 年累计后移约 2.1 万名；2025 年基准约 69412 名，为近 5 年最高（最易进）；本省物理类计划 2021 年 13 人、2022 年 16 人、2023 年 16 人、2024 年 23 人、2025 年 34 人；2026 年计划 40 人，较 2025 年扩招约 17.6%，扩招幅度较大，对竞争有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名 2026 年约第 157 名，近年排名从 198→185→176→165→168→157，呈稳步上升趋势；延边大学在声誉文件中无显著负面或正面事件记录；抖音热度排名第 79，评价为「一般」，短视频平台关注度处于中等偏下水平，未见明显报考热度异常信号；历史投档异常记录中无该校信息；延边大学在第五轮学科评估中无 A-/A/A+ 等级学科，优势学科以外国语言文学（朝鲜语方向）为特色，但未进入 A 类评级，对高分考生吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 物理类招生专业以计算机、电子信息、通信、机械、临床医学等为主，其中计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专 业社会热度持续偏热至高热，临床医学热度稳定偏热；2026 年广东省物理类考生约 45.6 万人，较 2025 年 44.0 万人增加约 3.6%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争；延边大学位于吉林省延边州，距广东较远，地域偏好偏弱；该校在广东省招生占比近年约 1.9%–3.3%（2025 年约 1.9%），属跨省招生中占比偏低的学校，地域吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026 年计划扩招约 17.6%（缓解竞争）、广东省物理类考生增加约 3.6%（加剧竞争）、学校层次稳步上升但无 A 类学科支撑、抖音热度一般等因素，扩招效应略大于考生增加效应，但位次后移惯性仍存；在 2025 年基准 69412 名基础上，预计最低位次约 76260 名，区间 75760–76760 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 47741→48156→54261→56421→69412, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 21,000 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 69412, the highest (easiest to enter) in the past 5 years; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 13 in 2021, 16 in 2022, 16 in 2023, 23 in 2024, and 34 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 40, an increase of about 17.6% compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion that alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it is approximately 157th, with a steady upward trend in recent years from 198→185→176→165→168→157; Yanbian University has no significant negative or positive events recorded in reputation documents; Douyin popularity ranking is 79th, rated as 'average', with short video platform attention at a medium-low level, no obvious abnormal signals in application popularity; there is no information about this university in historical admission anomaly records; Yanbian University has no A-/A/A+ level disciplines in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, with advantageous disciplines featuring foreign language and literature (Korean direction) but not entering the A-level rating, limiting its appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Physics Category enrollment majors mainly include Computer Science, Electronic Information, Communication, Mechanical Engineering, Clinical Medicine, etc., among which Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, etc., have sustained high to very high social popularity, while Clinical Medicine has stable and moderately high popularity; in 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong Province is about 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% compared to 440,000 in 2025, with the expansion of candidate scale intensifying competition; Yanbian University is located in Yanbian Prefecture, Jilin Province, far from Guangdong, with weak regional preference; the university's enrollment proportion in Guangdong Province in recent years is about 1.9%–3.3% (about 1.9% in 2025), a relatively low proportion among cross-provincial enrollments, with limited regional appeal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment plan expansion of about 17.6% (alleviating competition), the increase of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong Province by about 3.6% (intensifying competition), the steady rise in university level but without A-level discipline support, and average Douyin popularity, the expansion effect slightly outweighs the candidate increase effect, but the backward inertia of rankings still exists; based on the 2025 baseline of 69412, the estimated minimum ranking is about 76260, with a range of 75760–76760.

- Electronic Information Engineering
- Communication Engineering
- Artificial Intelligence.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 75760–76760, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<75760), you can focus on aiming for popular Tier 1 majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>76760), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 10224→13140→16090→25792→21302, showing significant fluctuations overall, with a sharp drop to 25792 in 2024 followed by a recovery to 21302 in 2025; over the past 2 years, the ranking has shifted backward by about 5200 places; the 2025 baseline is approximately 21302; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 1 person in 2021, 2 in 2022, 2 in 2023, 6 in 2024, and 6 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 24 people, a 300% increase compared to 2025, representing a substantial expansion that significantly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 157th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a steady upward trend in recent years; Yanbian University has no significant negative or positive events recorded in reputation documents; Douyin popularity ranking is 79th, rated as 'average'; no information about this university in historical admission anomaly records, indicating no significant psychological disturbance in applications; Yanbian University has no A-level disciplines, but its Foreign Language and Literature (Korean language direction) is a traditional specialty with certain influence in the field of Northeast Asian language and culture.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: History Category enrollment majors mainly include Korean Language, Chinese Language and Literature, Russian, Japanese, and Geographical Sciences; social popularity of foreign language majors is generally lukewarm, while Chinese language/literature majors are relatively hot, and teacher training directions are divided; in 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Guangdong Province is approximately 326,200, an increase of about 11.6% from 292,200 in 2025, representing a significant increase in examinee numbers and intensified competition; Yanbian University is located in Yanbian Prefecture, Jilin Province, far from Guangdong, with weak regional preference; the university's enrollment proportion in Guangdong's History Category is extremely low (only 6 people in 2025), with a small cross-provincial enrollment scale and limited regional appeal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as large fluctuations in historical rankings, a 300% enrollment expansion in 2026 (greatly alleviating competition), an approximately 11.6% increase in Guangdong History Category examinees (intensifying competition), steadily rising university level, and generally lukewarm popularity of foreign language majors, the expansion effect far outweighs the examinee increase effect, leading to significantly eased competition; based on the 2025 baseline of 21302, the estimated minimum ranking is approximately 59146, with a range of 58646–59646.
